summary_options: 8 years of experience across internet products and enterprise software, with end-to-end ownership from discovery to launch and iteration.
Focused on AI applications, data products, and workflow automation, with strong cross-functional delivery experience.
Experienced in turning ambiguous business problems into shippable product plans with measurable business outcomes.

work_experiences.title: Senior Product Manager
bullets: Led the design of an enterprise knowledge-base assistant used across support, sales, and internal operations.
Shipped an LLM-based retrieval pipeline that improved document QA accuracy by 25 percent.
Worked with engineering, applied AI, and implementation teams to reduce customer onboarding time.

work_experiences.title: Product Manager
bullets: Owned roadmap planning for a shared data platform supporting multiple business lines.
Designed approval and task-routing modules that cut core operations processing time by 40 percent.
Improved cross-team execution through a structured intake and prioritization process.

project_experiences.name: AI Resume Tailoring Assistant
bullets: Designed a master-profile schema and JD matching strategy for generating multiple resumes from one profile.
Introduced LaTeX-based resume output for consistency and delivery speed.
Built keyword ranking and highlight selection logic to surface the best-fit experience for each role.

project_experiences.name: Internal Knowledge QA Platform
bullets: Owned the platform from discovery to rollout, including document ingestion, permissions, and answer tracing.
Improved first-answer hit rate by optimizing chunking and retrieval quality.

education.school: East China University of Science and Technology
